title: EpistemicToolbox
description: A collection of epistemic tools used to represent and reason about reality.

name.description: Canonical name of the epistemic tool.

description.description: Concise explanation of the tool and its epistemic function.

url.description: Reference URL for further documentation or usage context.

svg-icon.description: SVG markup or path reference representing the tool icon.

tags.description: Semantic or functional tags for classification and retrieval.
